name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Re: Signature from you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We want this reminder posted on EVERY Democrat’s office. |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

It's now Day Two of the Schumer Shutdown. This statement needs to be posted in every Democrat's office -- and the President wants your name signed below his.
_" We The People will **NEVER FORGET** January 19, 2018, the day Senate Democrats chose to shut down the _American_ government, deprive _American_ children of health care, and hold our _American_ military hostage to protect **_illegal_** immigrants._" [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf12ff82f4e72facba363bb30b35bedc39df55bd85d27aa177270c15232e5379a6b0115d3484551cf1cad1efc7827d80364) **SIGNED BY AN OUTRAGED AMERICAN VOTER** **VOTER: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf1b04ea402e4a26c307d248119576b12cae0de66e1644ddc4ba3886c16ad83b28fa5ac3a41fea40e9cce07092d3516f2e1)**
**SIGNATURE:** _***NOT SIGNED***_
**DEADLINE: **11:59 PM TONIGHT ****[ **SIGN YOUR NAME** ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf1a04a95b8b284a70b719c4da90561be3889166ccd9f1cdbbe210f48185bfcdfae01ef93bd0fe3cdfbc76f8a0e4ec8d8ea)****

**[Please sign your name to the President's statement now. >>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf16fda03316500433818dd6e0c82a44437dac0e460cd0f098c3158239b96fde6eacb946851ce54bd55a860957cc8b3d681)**

Thanks,

Team TRUMP
[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf1fea1bd23c045c68c696b3f845c6dfc63fb5e5d6948656695e629e2f92b8b15d18d0da5e3c475d59418dfaca6ca462219)

**\-----FORWARDED MESSAGE-----**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Sent:** January 20, 2018
**Subject:** re: Important note on SHUTDOWN
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf1b015726cee959b793b3bb9e883a6ec78d4f6bdfc3be7da32b6a7bb51622b4e7e3678826bdc1f6c3287e21cc0713f1056) **

---
| [ ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf1b8ae346295059f29a700fd30f1bd46a5bc97d5bd4dc3a3484c6b6ab6eb3f4aa9e630dba5670aea26ee8d835d94452883)
---

Friend,

When I became your president one year ago today, I took an oath to protect, serve, and lead ALL _Americans._

Democrats have since shown our country that they could never do the same.

They chose to use our U.S. military as a bargaining chip to fight for amnesty for _non-citizen_ illegal immigrants. But a good many patriots and I REFUSED to accept their ransom.

**Now American voters need to remind Democrats that we will NEVER forget their reckless decision.

[Tell Senate Democrats that YOU -- the American voter -- will ALWAYS remember the day that Democrats put illegal immigrants before American citizens. >>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf16fda03316500433818dd6e0c82a44437dac0e460cd0f098c3158239b96fde6eacb946851ce54bd55a860957cc8b3d681)**

Thank you -- and stand strong!

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf1fc3a317118d0f7046910050e5d00a16bf423751d613047c95e8b27f7316f90280101da5b71e7058b8eadf00123090563)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf16be3ad458048e6a56270a188d00b5999df3da24b59baeb768b5bcb9bd52bd1d953521d2454a5778850bf9648a038b11b)
---

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8211eb3c30f12cf1c8bf1e2fe83664f7013aac19fcf623c2ff88032be232b23db3ecd54cbd07c61228f40929003329de312ec8801ce25448) | [Unsubscribe ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fcfefc8a0b87e634bf217c362b1972c675ec68e80319a41f6e93980ff936d0960dd0fdae84b45a937b968268a226833d21) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256ca4908fbe392d5625a13f81057deb7b25ce161c1a997b2b7cf2450034a2d67fdc)

name: Leah
subject: they shut it down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
It’s never been more clear that the only mission of Senate Democrats is to obstruct the agenda of the American people. Friday night, as the clock....

Friend,

It’s never been more clear that the only mission of Senate Democrats is to obstruct the agenda of the American people.

Friday night, as the clock ticked towards midnight, Tammy Baldwin and the liberal elites stood by and watched — as they let the government shut down.

Is this what Americans voted for? Inaction?

I don’t think so. People all over this country, and certainly Wisconsin, voted to see an agenda that finally puts America First. We voted for President Trump.

But Tammy Baldwin and her gang didn’t care. They voted with Chuck Schumer and the DC consultants who think political games mean more than representing the people.

It’s a disgrace. And I think Wisconsin has had enough.

I had my team put together a petition today to [**tell Tammy Baldwin and the Democrats to get back to work and pass a budget.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3oi-nw3ysbUR_btt2t76sQ6lwrxoypzVck4pjdLlRpp0LnsQGk0mTcTUpS0Gxtbg1ppJP130gY0eav-71YQQOL4LEs8BPW8LdAsrAy7jFAy1GagK7IGPefdkoKOBGfvlVG2vzmUqsH97zjM0RfS1pa9G2AwQGLu8yOD_6iz1dxADKzSGuPHqZN3kW00dqg3oi3jhdRNSBZ6ZB5KuCwwA4Djtmh1vOBA0iz5SowKVBUP3EovPuUb3haZhejWj_t4g2NMXMFpSZl7fWNG2Jm_-Ev5gCvH1a8zqT23lQsekVxvFAu7iikKSDnzIHWeew-3r3tIkHATKt7wBi9BfzAavsXvGAzu5YPk2t0FDVJUbGwOVVi2ay-aMGWsfAjlSQ0Nhw4SR6wcBmHtJ2y2D_86IB7Y%3D) This government shutdown is NOT what America voted for.

[ADD YOUR NAME](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3oi-nw3ysbUR_btt2t76sQ6lwrxoypzVck4pjdLlRpp0LnsQGk0mTcTUpS0Gxtbg1ppJP130gY0eav-71YQQOL4LEs8BPW8LdAsrAy7jFAy1GagK7IGPefdkoKOBGfvlVG2vzmUqsH97zjM0RfS1pa9G2AwQGLu8yOD_6iz1dxADkorn_mjSwwLtNHNjqDI4TB7vyDlEhGSeX4qLKmv4dGYxk41hzNCufkSwyCXxZEWVd2Pi9WLXGFHV3_SsM-fGtXr7wo9Kr9IT-E7-EoyYNd-Ys-awgjcik5XfxsbMioVir8N8BABGPl9idwzrIYe2RLCOZg3jD8mJArM6PHyLwVdSFbFbzrMIv6L8SkflgsUQb_VO-L15TTqPNi94hnXebFCWOHpdgr35Hg0DmsjaL1c%3D)
---

Friend, while the Democrats are celebrating their shutdown, America’s most valued — our soldiers — are going without pay. Our parks and government centers may be unavailable. And essential services could be withheld.

All because Tammy Baldwin stood with the extreme left of her party and New York Democratic Leader, Chuck Schumer.

It’s petty. It’s juvenile. It’s exactly what needs to be fixed in Washington.

Please join me today by signing my petition: **[https://leahvukmir.com/government-shutdown/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3oi-nw3ysbUR_btt2t76sQ6lwrxoypzVck4pjdLlRpp0LnsQGk0mTcTUpS0Gxtbg1ppJP130gY0eav-71YQQOL4LEs8BPW8LdAsrAy7jFAy1GagK7IGPefdkoKOBGfvlVG2vzmUqsH97zjM0RfS1pa9G2AwQGLu8yOD_6iz1dxADrD_NtxI76wUPbrngSlBiO75bEBWNCDbcKJ25SE1VeW9cekaXXmCtcmM-ST5QY5XuEeZdwzpjLlLMxyRRS9mG_rv7d7vmg-G-MyYF18YNZruBmSEzQV_gN_-Qiq8v8y7HwFXgQ_QyGWcL6OJk9diL5D1ujcia_hx1yGye2PwUQXEaBAMWmnbEhObR9SMezMXm7hPzU7FrId-W5Zl7_lOc5qaP1QcCZ7daeyG8JdSHDn0%3D)**

Wisconsin deserves better than these useless theatrics.

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3k4MF1J3uCSM8FcggYs-7KnKRrvKSSMJ7-hqakuxCsh3MONaq0YdiQw78ARFN2HoLLP0MG6NEAr_a6wQcd3jchDejFxIxm_vx3Cvc1IZ7V0gT2l2q6100SikDiy1kTloXda_-rLMhLh_Iy_q7AkHY0FEg-nJYOCASWBKvgYyuU9z51b1P8QugjSBDQAvcYS8dKxuij2sTqGC6NQF7v2AgS8gUbPDfJcntRmSQPU63QGKUfBcc_GVnizw9NK4AAJrAg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3gcw9U2x_wPxSY7MbbUKp4XElg4oKg56UbDtrXBW2P0ArNR1v4Ssj_uFCM5aeHYL-4lZhtQCiae6XQFuQlH4tS4OcbK--sEa8ZQq-EHzCBTxZlh5TGgjyoC8mO8J73Q50rVp-2CcC_l4cMO3ST8YFX0L1_czwVfq8FoFy9ENrQTu7fJcslem9096hGKezH8wUMOus1mhIVsbMUJmB2uO5xbypUIYTSUJaSPlQI15ADFOwB7nL9GdSPdqN4y2Lra0FQ%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=Jyspa79bxjHTPH7uT6sE9EClSktInSyjWvdTkq46Uh-bqH8lkUwW_aeA0kYKTo_pxCGYrepcx0px3mZ9V0MrmMxOXkzBFtgpZsF29sudAD-ZTmNSx2s0eJj-FnSg8YcdZtt4qPdVUDZWJlbgnWCNLqQRxZtLTWwYsdiEywbfdG4y4gZKwHGpkYVm8psalFLsWskHKtA2rHQsHfda2vLk1fv6eC0SP7D01fJ1-DKFqQPNoe_JUFA8LU_Or0HjQ4E3). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3u72_71OJkYIfp2_qPXBVFqSbhxVI2skx7dz9N2EkhCBZBvmXo5_qAT-onxeh1c15u3St9TsTI-IcbIKzJ_N0RrNlNXhf6e6KxXLFnaG2UR6Gc9rjv6C8jO5bH9fg2ZjXxyM82gLC5cuov_9XgA_bzOfB_Ww8a8ow9c_47nFm4cN1mu4YdmFb9y5EFJKXseasr2NpfZhvmGkSMSOY0-pYSyS5U01Q6aC9s5BPIamvicOD-ldwhW7NA7GRrn7AoSv_r4yrQUJ_v2St6LGIjvyB7A0QgP4NCOoTXukUXGPBulEp_3EQrsa0as9bWGpWv7yJHCbIYO_QLAp-47nfiD6PxTSLkbYz5yw2MYnUJI8wQAN) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3u72_71OJkYIfp2_qPXBVFpzjA1-OpDFYyqKr9TEMoRUFR-9GK8nxG8Gy3Kzs7-ZT8KN1QCqxeBhUn9YZfOX3DA2igZI-ac3eMtz2UDVi5eaYo9nYVv1h8PyL_WKGFwvazWC3KiDQOyGZJo6Xo1cPBdOsbdYYkXta2IgutDr5Ixj9JbncKrWkgaSj1Gp_8s6qwfEyJ0y31jFJEXaH1AcEdaxhxK1c9bo2-TmcNplK8Wmujp7Tq2sp2SLRM1078QPF2bRic5EFCfo0uE9YUR0BmWyWvwHY9emZUuXPgvbF6zPQQO1YX9HDysHscCGDRg5qxiPxTbRFhK78pmK4jgaqdZkW7xiYE8XsbV4zpYmFWDf) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3k4MF1J3uCSM8FcggYs-7KnKRrvKSSMJ7-hqakuxCsh3qm57i0HrrSuWvXCfimhebbGYem2Hk4xH13TzwS_gNsDGmK-CEFJMcDmBd8eW52GjggbZUpmzeS3Rnkmc6fzwWDaxrF2oYlZpWVrisPmOjXpcm5mUMx8I4H3jO5cMyO1l3gjXD2-iZOJ2pK3qpUUhD7XaaLGEvYkGL3Lg2U1pgjQ8147Qs5cV3m8UiizV08MyT86EFCRRO6HxrUy5E47AYw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3gcw9U2x_wPxSY7MbbUKp4XElg4oKg56UbDtrXBW2P0AL0ciHZiHGysmAsH4F8wt_EVx_0K8HbTnDJqXnHbxnHhlrUqVM3cn34Hn18nlQhJ9Uo-uwY3G_o_SVvsHDwaQ1Zuv1AuWLjPdP3UohMF50OJFquuj_4-9XHeIAlrPSrs8BjktfQ48RGg_ATAMFY1UjVQx0UtToVbz7V6TdP8I2TrHKaXIkNTMocvdQq6hvwCLz_HMGgXXqzNtiiWK5QQlZA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3vPjTlSn6ysMP2ZxnkHBVn56ByaOm3kjbLdWHmAg8mAZdKn7Pdrxm_EcO-OzPwqplutqZbMIWIOncyBiwalr2gGzz3jz6lzfw-V5qgF6xhfYJxakxwzdoYIJmZU7SeHNTj4gxb1gPiwsMNg2N76jJTuyoqTijPgOqICy_n1VDmtn9JFOwSwf9uJPnADiIYQud7vZ5PtrrgMKHgBlRwZy-Gk3UNoOYyWXDi-ZQWG7VFsKVzV7nkPyKq4r7PMPcGJWdA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=SjUZxXROe-IkZvfSkwug3u72_71OJkYIfp2_qPXBVFrE2TGF0wU97U5Ox4Hagfs4xfbci16wp7ylohrylM4l01U61ELlZXhTea8eUJ0NnETCB-MdmNzDgPMRe7XJjoJqQhxebHlwWYtbPKMT_Cm31Xhi80TrK7FvhBH48FWL7b44YyYXFme32GEPi01-Q0UQLHYpSQfN07XnjgjNiamp6pdPKI3ZDf3r-K8uT-5qaKQRuL9JJzCyb_EM3-riaeT0s6rm9YOOZTinEq8N3FSckIx7evKI_MJBJkysCT3DE6n59d-xCzbz1AQocW9488vd9qGRT1zs6bdRBF80HYpWV4OQy8kgpYTHPTEEKphypqecbcdgP86j3bONQlcv1S5G-k-QI31mN4h12MCIMaYecQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=Jyspa79bxjHTPH7uT6sE9EClSktInSyjWvdTkq46Uh-bqH8lkUwW_aeA0kYKTo_pxCGYrepcx0px3mZ9V0MrmMxOXkzBFtgpZsF29sudAD-ZTmNSx2s0eJj-FnSg8YcdZtt4qPdVUDZWJlbgnWCNLqQRxZtLTWwYsdiEywbfdG4y4gZKwHGpkYVm8psalFLsWskHKtA2rHQsHfda2vLk1fv6eC0SP7D01fJ1-DKFqQPNoe_JUFA8LU_Or0HjQ4E3) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1126270c08844a3b8c506c135c6d7d29&_e=Jyspa79bxjHTPH7uT6sE9EClSktInSyjWvdTkq46Uh-bqH8lkUwW_aeA0kYKTo_pxCGYrepcx0px3mZ9V0MrmMxOXkzBFtgpZsF29sudAD-ZTmNSx2s0eJj-FnSg8YcdZtt4qPdVUDZWJlbgnWCNLqQRxZtLTWwYsdiEywbfdG4y4gZKwHGpkYVm8psalFLsWskHKtA2rHQsHfda2vLk1fv6eC0SP7D01fJ1-DKFqQPNoe_JUFA8LU_Or0HjQ4E3) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Gov. Kasich was on PBS NewsHour this past week, where he spoke
about DACA and the need for a compassionate solution to protect
the Dreamers. Watch this short clip.

Peter, Gov. Kasich was on PBS
NewsHour this past week, where he spoke about DACA and the need
for a compassionate solution to protect the Dreamers. Watch this
short clip:

Governor Kasich also teamed up
with Secretary Madeleine Albright to release the Freedom House
report on the state of democracy and political freedom around the
world. The Governor said he believed that American institutions
remained strong, but weak American support for NATO and other
alliances would strengthen and embolden authoritarian regimes
abroad. He also warned that attacks by the Trump administration
on the courts and the press would encourage similar behavior by
autocrats overseas where such institutions are already weaker.
Read more (here).

Gov. Kasich and Colorado Gov.
John Hickenlooper joined together to send a letter to Republican
and Democrat leaders in Congress imploring them to find a
solution for DACA and the Children's Health Insurance Program
(CHIP).

These issues have broad,
bipartisan support and we shouldn't let the politics of the day
disrupt the commitments we've made to these children and young
adults. Read the letter (here)

On behalf of Ohio, Gov. Kasich
also attended the 2018 North American International Auto Show in
Detroit to meet with industry leaders to discuss how Ohioans can
benefit from the next generation of technology and mobility.
Learn more (here).

On Thursday, Gov. Kasich took
another step to ensure that Ohio is among the leading states in
autonomous vehicle research and smart road technology.

The governor signed an executive
order creating DriveOhio, a new statewide center that will work
to keep Ohio's position as a national leader in this industry.
Read more (here).

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help! Be sure to follow Gov. Kasich on Facebook (here)
and Twitter (here) for the latest updates!

-Team Kasich

P.S. If you'd like to chip in to
support Gov. Kasich's message, please consider making a generous
donation at: JohnKasich.com/Donate

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

clean_body: Gov. Kasich was on PBS NewsHour this past week, where he spoke about DACA and the need for a compassionate solution to protect the Dreamers. Watch this short clip. Peter, Gov. Kasich was on PBS NewsHour this past week, where he spoke about DACA and the need for a compassionate solution to protect the Dreamers. Watch this short clip: Governor Kasich also teamed up with Secretary Madeleine Albright to release the Freedom House report on the state of democracy and political freedom around the world. The Governor said he believed that American institutions remained strong, but weak American support for NATO and other alliances would strengthen and embolden authoritarian regimes abroad. He also warned that attacks by the Trump administration on the courts and the press would encourage similar behavior by autocrats overseas where such institutions are already weaker. Read more (here). Gov. Kasich and Colorado Gov. John Hickenlooper joined together to send a letter to Republican and Democrat leaders in Congress imploring them to find a solution for DACA and the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP). These issues have broad, bipartisan support and we shouldn't let the politics of the day disrupt the commitments we've made to these children and young adults. Read the letter (here) On behalf of Ohio, Gov. Kasich also attended the 2018 North American International Auto Show in Detroit to meet with industry leaders to discuss how Ohioans can benefit from the next generation of technology and mobility. Learn more (here). On Thursday, Gov. Kasich took another step to ensure that Ohio is among the leading states in autonomous vehicle research and smart road technology. The governor signed an executive order creating DriveOhio, a new statewide center that will work to keep Ohio's position as a national leader in this industry. Read more (here). Thank you for all that you're doing to help! Be sure to follow Gov. Kasich on Facebook (here) and Twitter (here) for the latest updates! -Team Kasich P.S. If you'd like to chip in to support Gov. name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Government by division doesn't work
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Yesterday was the one year anniversary of Trump's inauguration. **And it's only fitting that on this day, the chaos and destructiveness of his first year in office has left our government closed for business.** During the last government shutdown, Florida families suffered. Head Start programs were suspended. 3.9 million Florida veterans and survivors couldn't file benefit claims. Half of the employees at the Florida National Guard were furloughed, affecting their ability to prepare for hurricanes and tropical storms. Right now, we are repeating that history -- and it's not history Florida families need to live through again. Republicans control Congress and the White House. Make no mistake -- this is a Trump shutdown. It is a reckless refusal to govern responsibly that threatens public health, hurts our economy, blocks investments in research and services, and wastes military resources. I wish I could say I'm surprised, but I'm not. This Republican Party who focuses on tax breaks for billionaires instead of middle class families is lost when it comes to offering a responsible budget. They've refused so far to protect pensions or defend DREAMers. Governing by division doesn't work -- and today, it's led to the Trump Shutdown. The American people deserve better than this. **I'm ready to work.[_Join me in calling on Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Paul Ryan to come to the negotiating table with Democrats and get the government running again._](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb2/622b7b5b/18e9d792/307bb961/1407981076/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180121fl")** Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb2/622b7b5b/18e9d792/307bb960/1407981076/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: March on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e824/4126765196/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&source=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG")
Hello,

It's been a long year with Donald Trump in the White House -- and this weekend's government shutdown over immigration only further encapsulates how damaging he is as our nation's leader.

But since I launched this campaign last year, I've been amazed by the amount of fight and optimism people have, including the massive crowds at marches around Florida this weekend.

It's clear we're ready for a new way forward.

**[Will you take a moment to chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, and help us continue building momentum for change in Florida?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e827/4126765196/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+take+a+moment+to+chip+in+5+or+w")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e826/4126765196/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=3+-+Express+Donate++ask+")**

**[Express Donate: $50](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e839/4126765196/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_content=4+-+Express+Donate++ask2+")**

**[Express Donate: $100](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e838/4126765196/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_content=5+-+Express+Donate++ask3+")**

**[Express Donate: $200](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e83b/4126765196/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck5DQjlmUT09IjoiMjAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_content=6+-+Express+Donate++ask4+")**

**[Or donate another amount](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e83a/4126765196/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&express_lane=true&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e83d/4126765196/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_content=8")

This first year of Trump and the Republicans -- from a tax scam that overwhelmingly favors ultra-wealthy corporations, to an assault on our civil liberties and justice -- makes it necessary for bold and courageous steps in the states to strengthen the middle class from the center out.

Providing health insurance for children, protecting young immigrants working to make a better life, protecting women's rights, and asking the richest corporations to pay more of their fair share -- these are the real issues that matter to Florida families.

We have the opportunity to change the status quo and elect leadership that will stand up and make our voices heard, but we'll need to keep up the fight to make it happen.

**[Are you with me? Chip in today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e83c/4126765196/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_content=9+-+Are+you+with+me+Chip+in+today")**

Thank you,

Andrew

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e83f/4126765196/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-jan-2018?utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&utm_content=10+-+Donate")

Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e831/4126765196/VEsHBw/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=12+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&source=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ec/9e00690/436b116d/2403e830/4126765196/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=13+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG&source=em18_180121_WomenM2_fnd_gq_act_AG")
